name: Sunset Fishing Trip
description: A relaxing fishing trip along the coast during sunset. Suitable for beginners and families.
instructions: Arrive at the dock 30 minutes early.
Bring your own fishing rod or rent one on site.

name: Weekend Beach Picnic
description: Enjoy a relaxing picnic at the popular West Coast beach area. Bring your own food and enjoy the view.
instructions: Reserve a picnic table in advance.
Dispose of trash in designated bins.

name: Changi Kayak Adventure
description: Explore the mangroves and coastline of Changi by kayak. Guided tour with all equipment provided.
instructions: Wear comfortable clothes that can get wet.
Bring a change of clothes and a towel.
Listen to the guide's instructions before launching.

name: Jurong Lake Walk
description: A peaceful evening walk around Jurong Lake. Perfect for nature lovers and photographers.
instructions: Bring a camera for stunning sunset shots.

name: West Coast Seafood Feast
description: A culinary adventure at West Coast's famous seafood restaurants. Sample fresh catches of the day.
instructions: Make a reservation at least 2 days in advance.
Ask for the chef's daily specials.
Bring cash as some stalls may not accept cards.
